state.next-action: Phase `18` is still in progress on `18-06`. Task `18-05` remains complete: the shared-section editor and page-composer publish surface now load native Payload version history, restore selected versions back into draft state, and keep their history lists in sync after save, publish, clone, and restore actions without adding approvals, scheduling, or diff tooling. Task `18-08` is also complete: the live canvas toolbar is now primarily single-line with an icon-only close action, the visible Structure tab has been removed in favor of live-page selection plus drawer-based page metadata controls, and hero/service/testimonial media rendering has been normalized onto the shared media component while hero copy and section copy remain editable directly on the page. Focus next on `18-06`: extend verification beyond the new restore route/UI coverage into the broader shared-section authoring matrix, especially propagation, detach/replace behavior, constrained layout rules, and focused browser coverage.
